mapper.select:
SELECT c.id, c.tomb_id, t.name AS tomb_name, c.visitor_name, c.type, c.ip, c.location, c.create_time FROM tomb_checkin c LEFT JOIN tomb t ON c.tomb_id = t.id AND t.del_flag = 0
AND (c.visitor_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%') OR t.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%'))
AND c.type = #{param.type}
AND c.tomb_id = #{param.tombId}
AND t.family_id IN ( WITH RECURSIVE fid AS ( SELECT id FROM family WHERE id = #{param.familyId} AND del_flag = 0 UNION ALL SELECT f.id FROM family f INNER JOIN fid ON f.pid = fid.id WHERE f.del_flag = 0 ) SELECT id FROM fid )
AND ((t.family_id IS NOT NULL AND (SELECT COALESCE(f.root_id, f.id) FROM family f WHERE f.id = t.family_id AND f.del_flag = 0 LIMIT 1) IN ( SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(f2.root_id, f2.id) FROM family f2 WHERE f2.del_flag = 0 AND (f2.founder_id = #{param.currentUserId} OR f2.id IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_member WHERE user_id = #{param.currentUserId} AND del_flag = 0) OR COALESCE(f2.root_id, f2.id) IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_admin WHERE user_id = #{param.currentUserId})) )) OR (t.family_id IS NULL AND (t.user_id = #{param.currentUserId} OR t.create_by = #{param.currentUserId})))
AND c.del_flag = 0
ORDER BY c.id DESC

SELECT c.id, c.tomb_id, t.name AS tomb_name, c.visitor_name, c.type, c.ip, c.location, c.create_time FROM tomb_checkin c LEFT JOIN tomb t ON c.tomb_id = t.id AND t.del_flag = 0 WHERE c.del_flag = 0 ORDER BY c.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT c.id, c.tomb_id, t.name AS tomb_name, c.visitor_name, c.type, c.ip, c.location, c.create_time FROM tomb_checkin c INNER JOIN tomb t ON c.tomb_id = t.id AND t.del_flag = 0
AND ((t.family_id IS NOT NULL AND (SELECT COALESCE(f.root_id, f.id) FROM family f WHERE f.id = t.family_id AND f.del_flag = 0 LIMIT 1) IN ( SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(f2.root_id, f2.id) FROM family f2 WHERE f2.del_flag = 0 AND (f2.founder_id = #{currentUserId} OR f2.id IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_member WHERE user_id = #{currentUserId} AND del_flag = 0) OR COALESCE(f2.root_id, f2.id) IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_admin WHERE user_id = #{currentUserId})) )) OR (t.family_id IS NULL AND (t.user_id = #{currentUserId} OR t.create_by = #{currentUserId})))
AND c.del_flag = 0 AND t.id IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY c.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tomb_checkin WHERE tomb_id = #{tombId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND (del_flag = 0 OR del_flag IS NULL) AND DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
